params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 16-bit shift register that captures a serial input signal (rx_in) with shift functionality controlled by a clock (clk) and a control signal (brg_en). On each clock cycle, if brg_en is deasserted, the shift register shifts in the new input bit from rx_in while shifting out the most significant bit, effectively moving the contents of the register to the left. The output signals, shift_0 and shift_15, indicate the current values of the least and most significant bits of the register, respectively. Upon a reset (rst), the register initializes to all zeros (16'h0000).
